'''Dega''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dega system/Legends|Dega system]] of the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. Its local day was 19 standard hours long; its year was 295 local days long. The planet was covered in rocky wastelands. It hosted a [[Radell Mining Corporation]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony. During the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the world's minerals and [[Ore/Legends|ores]] ran dry. The colony was abandoned, leaving behind a polluted planet. The old mines became [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]' refuges.

==Description==
Plant life was scarce, and the water, what could be found of it, was poisoned by chemical wastes. The monstrous, rusted chunks of obsolete mining equipment and smelting facilities, all judged too old and useless to incur the expense of moving them off-planet, were a common sight. The planet surface bore deep scars and holes from various mining operations. The ground under Dega's surface was honey-combed with mining tunnels, many of which were unsafe and prone to collapse.

==Appearances==
*[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']]
